sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67266" key="me/tton" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μέττον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μεῖζον</foreign>, Ilsch. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μέττος</orth>, <sense id="n67266.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μέσος</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεττρία</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὔθυνα</ref></xr>, Id.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαστρεία</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
